name: Classic Espresso
description: Rich, bold, and intense espresso shot made from premium Arabica beans.

name: Caramel Macchiato
description: Espresso mixed with vanilla-flavored syrup, milk, and caramel drizzle.

name: Iced Matcha Latte
description: Premium ceremonial grade matcha blended with cold milk and ice.

name: Strawberry Smoothie
description: Fresh strawberries blended with Greek yogurt and honey.

name: New York Cheesecake
description: Classic creamy cheesecake with a graham cracker crust and berry compote.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: Warm chocolate cake with a molten center, served with vanilla ice cream.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Smashed avocado on artisanal sourdough with cherry tomatoes and microgreens.

name: Truffle Fries
description: Crispy french fries tossed with truffle oil, parmesan, and parsley.

name: Aroma Signature Brunch
description: Poached eggs, smoked salmon, roasted asparagus, and hollandaise sauce.

name: Grilled Chicken Panini
description: Herb-grilled chicken, pesto, mozzarella, and sun-dried tomatoes on ciabatta.
